name: Pureed Green Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the green beans, onion, and chicken broth together.
2. Add the beef bouillon cube.
3. Puree the mixture in a blender while it is still hot.
4. Season with salt, pepper, and Worcestershire sauce to taste.
5. Divide the grated Cheddar cheese evenly into the bottoms of 4 soup cups.
6. Pour the soup into each cup.
7. Garnish with sour cream.
